task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened a web browser and navigated to the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Web browser showing the URL cameochemicals.noaa.gov or the CAMEO Chemicals homepage/search interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created a CSV file with the correct headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or spreadsheet application showing a file with the first row exactly matching: 'Chemical Name, EHS Status, TPQ (lbs)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent correctly recorded the EHS status and TPQ for Phosgene and Chlorine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains rows indicating Phosgene is 'YES' with TPQ '10' and Chlorine is 'YES' with TPQ '100'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent correctly recorded the EHS status and TPQ for Sulfuric Acid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains a row indicating Sulfuric Acid is 'YES' with TPQ '1000' (or 1,000).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent correctly recorded the EHS status and TPQ for Toluene and Acetone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains rows indicating Toluene is 'NO' with TPQ 'N/A' and Acetone is 'NO' with TPQ 'N/A'.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV file is saved with the correct name in the correct Desktop directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager showing 'epcra_screening_report.csv' on the Desktop, or a terminal/editor showing the file path as '/home/ga/Desktop/epcra_screening_report.csv'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually searched for the chemicals on the CAMEO Chemicals website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent typing chemical names/CAS numbers into the CAMEO search bar or viewing specific chemical data pages.

integrity.description: Verify the agent created an actual file rather than just outputting text to the console.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, vim) or a file manager window showing the file exists on the system.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't use a script with hardcoded answers to bypass the web search task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of python or bash scripts containing the final answers (YES/NO, 10, 100, 1000, N/A) being executed in the terminal without prior web browsing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified Ground Truth for EPCRA 302 EHS Status and TPQ: 1. Phosgene (CAS 75-44-5): EHS Status = YES, TPQ = 10. 2. Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5): EHS Status = YES, TPQ = 100. 3. Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9): EHS Status = YES, TPQ = 1000. 4. Toluene (CAS 108-88-3): EHS Status = NO, TPQ = N/A. 5. Acetone (CAS 67-64-1): EHS Status = NO, TPQ = N/A. Expected File: /home/ga/Desktop/epcra_screening_report.csv. Expected Headers: Chemical Name, EHS Status, TPQ (lbs).
